Business: Vipul Limited engages in the development of real estate properties in India. Its project portfolio includes a range of residential properties, such as integrated townships, villas, and communities, as well as commercial and retail properties. The company was formerly known as Vipul Infrastructure Developers Ltd and changed its name to Vipul Limited…

US Dollar Index (DXY) [2026-07-10]
  Current: 120.50  (-0.21% vs prior)
  India impact: Stronger DXY → FII outflows from India, rupee weakens; weaker DXY → FII inflows rise

Fed Funds Rate [2026-07-13]
  Current: 3.62 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

CBOE VIX [2026-07-13]
  Current: 17.16  (+14.17% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

US 10Y Treasury Yield [2026-06-01]
  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows

Yield Curve (10Y-2Y) [2026-07-14]
  Current: 0.40 %  (+11.11% vs prior)
  India impact: Negative spread = inverted curve = US recession risk → global risk-off, India hit
